title: Chargeman Ken! Collab (Scene 0011) - Making of
description:
Me and my friend AbsoL-G took part in the Chargeman Ken! collab orgazied by @bakertoons on Twitter, here's our entry for it.

Rough animation, cleanup and post-production by me.
Design, sketch animation, coloring and video recording by AbsoL-G
